dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}! Come and see! The smoke has cleared and there's actually sky above us!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} is behind us. The wounded are being treated, and {target_npc} has the rebuilding crews organized. The {quest_item} you brought back saved at least eight lives. You managed to {quest_action} when it mattered most. The settlement looks like a wreck, but it's a wreck full of people who refuse to give up.
dialogueChunks.outro: We pulled together what we could. It's not much compared to what you risked, but take it with the deepest thanks we've ever offered anyone.

playerResponses.text: Seeing the settlement fighting back is all the thanks I need.
Eight lives saved. That's a number worth remembering. Take care.

dialogueChunks.intro: We made it, {player_name}. Not everyone, but most of us. Most of us made it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We buried three people this morning. {target_npc} led the ceremony, and every person was there. But the shelters are standing, the supplies are distributed, and {quest_stakes} aren't crying from fear anymore. Grief, yes. But not fear. You managed to {quest_action}, and that tipped the balance.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this. Three lives lost, but dozens saved. That's the balance, and you tipped it in our favor.

playerResponses.text: I wish I could have saved everyone. I'm sorry for the three.
The ones who survived will honor those who didn't. That's all we can do.

dialogueChunks.intro: Look at them, {player_name}. Just look at them out there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The children are playing in the square again. Two days ago they were huddled in shelters, terrified and hungry. {target_npc} organized the food distribution so efficiently that we actually have a surplus. The {quest_item} you brought back is being rationed carefully. You managed to {quest_action}, and now {quest_stakes} are healing.
dialogueChunks.outro: Children laughing in a place that almost died. If that's not a miracle, I don't know what is. Take this, with our gratitude.

playerResponses.text: Children laughing in the rubble. That's worth every bruise and every mile.
Good to see things on the mend. You're tough people.

dialogueChunks.intro: The worst is behind us now. Finally, truly behind us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} drew up plans for rebuilding: not just repairs, but improvements. Wider drainage channels, a stone granary, a proper watchtower. {quest_threat} showed us every weakness, and now we have the chance to build better. The {quest_item} you supplied gave us the foundation. You managed to {quest_action}, and it gave us a future that's stronger than what we had before.
dialogueChunks.outro: A new wall on the first day of rebuilding. Take this. You didn't just save us: you gave us the chance to become something stronger.

playerResponses.text: Building back stronger. That's the best possible outcome from all this.
I'll come back someday and see that watchtower finished. Stay strong.
